sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 4.8 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.4)

statement.latex: Suppose$G$is a finitely generated free-by-cyclic group. Is$G$finitely presented? { G.\,Baumslag} Yes, it is; moreover, every finitely generated subgroup is finitely presented. For infinite cyclic extensions this is proved in (M.\,Feighn, M.\,Handel, Ann. Math., { 149}, no.\,3 (1999), 1061--1077), while another easier argument applies for finite cyclic extensions.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
